contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases the skb reference held in an ath10k_sdio_rx_data packet and zeroes out the packet fields. Caller must not access the ath10k_sdio_rx_data after calling this (unless it re-initializes it). This function unconditionally consumes the skb reference via dev_kfree_skb; the caller should have already ensured that the skb is no longer needed.
